name: 頒獎典禮舞台
description: 公開場合的身份揭露最具衝擊力，Ashley以Victoria身份登台，在眾目睽睽下揭穿Cora的冒充，將私人恩怨轉化為公共審判。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: Yes, I have many identities. You may be familiar with Victoria, but you can also call me by my real name, Ashley Green. / I stand here today because someone plagiarized my work and tried to steal my life. I will not let her succeed.
examples.context: 公開場合的身份揭露最具衝擊力，Ashley以Victoria身份登台，在眾目睽睽下揭穿Cora的冒充，將私人恩怨轉化為公共審判。
